heading: This Afternoon
text: Partly to mostly cloudy, with isolated snow showers in northern and western valleys; scattered over high terrain, with an inch or less. Valley temperatures nearly steady from the mid 20s to around 30, except low to mid 30s southeast. West to southwest winds 10 to 20 mph, gusting to 40 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Scattered mountain snow showers through midnight. Remaining mostly cloudy north and in the southern Greens, clouds decreasing elsewhere in the south. Lows from 5 to 15 above. West winds 5 to 15 mph, and gusting to 30 mph, diminishing overnight.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Valley highs in the upper 20s to lower 30s, with some mid 20s far north, and some mid 30s in southeastern valleys and in the Hudson Valley. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming southwest in the afternoon.
